title: rubus × formosus
intro: Rubus × formosus, also known as Formosa raspberry or Formosan raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, native to East Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus × formosus include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and infections. Rubus × formosus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
